Job_Description:
The Chief Executive Officer bears the full responsibility for the business operation and the success of the entire Audi dealership. By planning and systematic realization of activities he ensures the profit of the operation and the position in competition for the make.
The basis for this are the dealership or company targets, the dealer contract, the Audi value of the make and the Audi brand strategy, dealer expansion and investment planning, as well as the Audi standards set in the company vision.
Primary Responsibilities:
Dealership organization
Define the vision and mission statement for the dealer organization
Ensure creation and maintenance of a right sized dealer organization structure
Create and update dealership employee policies as per requirement
Ensure all performance management process activities of dealership employees are completed timely and satisfactorily
Approve employee incentive plans, performance ratings, salary increments and promotions for dealership employees
Approve recruitment plans for vacant / high attrition roles and long term retention plans for  employees
Business Planning
Build a short, mid and long term business plan for the dealer organization and ensure alignment with Audi India strategic goals
Finalize the Sales and Service Appendix and other annual dealership targets in alignment with Audi India
Responsible for regular planning and sharing of turnovers, costs and the profit for all the departments of the company in agreement with the dealer proprietor based on the Sales and Service Appendix and dealership priorities
Responsible for decisions on investment, financing and directives in respect of the tax office, banks and insurances in agreement with the proprietor(s).
Responsible for defining the business expansion plan for the dealer and building the business case to qualify the required investment
Ensure fulfilment of audit requirements for all transactions in compliance with Audi India and other regulatory stipulations
Responsible for defining and arranging the funding requirement for the business on an ongoing basis based on operations, expansion plans etc. from optimal sources and at optimal cost
Responsibility for Profit
The CEO bears the complete ownership for dealership top line, bottom line and profitability through various department heads.
The CEO needs to define measures for improving dealership profitability from time to time driving both revenue and cost elements
The CEO bears the responsibility for defining and allocating targets against critical dealership KPIs as defined in the Appendix
Business Monitoring
Conduct monthly, quarterly and annual business overview analysis (target vs. achievement) and performance analysis (including Metis(Financial) report analysis) meetings with the CFO and department heads
The CEO reviews progress and analyses the possible causes for deviations in results with the department managers and, introduces appropriate countermeasures
Brand Building
Responsible for optimal exploitation of the target market segments for new car sales, used car sales, accessories sales, VAS sales, and after sales services within the dealership’s area of operations
Draws up an overall business plan with the respective department heads to define marketing strategies for the sales and service departments
Determines the model, price and communication policy for sales and service based on the Audi India directives and the changing market dynamics in the region.
Ensures optimal realization of marketing spends and activation efforts to further the building of the dealership as well as the Audi brand in the region.
Acts as the top brand ambassador for the dealership as well as Audi in the region, in this respect, cultivates the personal contacts to potential major customers (such as authorities, trade associations, clubs, suppliers, companies and key customers) to further the company image. Also ensure that the dealership employees likewise represent the company and the Audi brand actively to the outside world.
Ensures that his department managers regularly analyze competitors in their area of the market for which they are responsible, summarize the results and, if necessary, introduces corrective measures
Responsible for a CI and CD-conform Audi image of the car company, more especially, all operation facilities as well as the effective internal and external measures to contribute to the brand presentation.
Measures (Reports):
Total Sales Turnover
Total Aftersales Turnover
Return on Sales for New Car, Used Car and Aftersales
Absorption Ratio for Service
Market Share - Sales
Retail Standards Sales  (RSS)
Retail Standards Aftersales (RSAS)
LRS Achievement
Manpower Attrition
% Manpower Trained in Sales and Aftersales
Employee Engagement score in Sales and Aftersales

Primary Responsibilities
Lead Generation
○ Actively participate in marketing activities and drive referrals to generate leads and achieve retail target
Vehicle Sales
Actively maintain contact with prospective customers to convert them into buyers and sell the entire Audi product portfolio
Regular follow-up on leads allocated through the marketing team, Audi India centrally
Make sure that the customer receives a warm welcome at the showroom, is made comfortable in the customer lounge area and is offered appropriate refreshments
Conduct need analysis with the customer, vehicle demonstration and test drives to create a unique product experience, making customers feel the need to buy an Audi
Demonstrate strong product and customer understanding to build trust and offer customers the right products from the Audi portfolio and draw up a complete offer which meets their exact needs and interests
Demonstrate the key highlights of the Audi vs competitive products
Check for Finance requirements, Trade-in opportunities, accessories, EW, Service Package, other VAS requirements from the customer
Guide the customer through the complete decision making process all the way from the offer to the signed contract in a way that ensures meeting of customer preferences as well as those of the dealership and AUDI India
Showcase strong customer orientation and ensure the customer has a Audi brand experience through the sales process, right from first contact to final vehicle delivery
Ensure achievement of monthly sales targets set in line with dealership sales appendix
Drive sales for the dealers by selling profitably and maximizing value added services sales
Additional Business Generation
Proactively check with the customer for incremental business opportunities for the dealership by evaluating for referrals, cross-selling possibilities through used car exchange, Finance schemes, Accessories sales, Extended Warranty and other value added services
Process Adherence
Plan and manage all system level reporting and documentation requirement as per Audi standards
Ensure Lead Management module owner ship of SFDC
Bring competitive intelligence and feedback, and ensure strong awareness of the competitive activities
Ensure adherence to process and achievement of LRS scores
Update and maintain the IPAD with latest information on Products, Pricing and Customer Schemes
Customer Satisfaction
Own the customer satisfaction scores for the sales process  through CSS
Ensure presence and owner ship of the customer vehicle sales and delivery process
Conduct home visit if required to drive customer satisfaction
Coordinate effectively with relevant teams and stake holders to ensure smooth execution of required processes such as Test Drives, Billing and payments, Loan approvals, RTO registrations, trade-in evaluations, and final vehicle handover
Relationship
Manage relationship with the existing customers post sales cycle to drive additional leads from referrals
Measures (Reports):
New Cars Overall Retail Target Achievement
New Car Modelwise\Variant wise Retail Target Achievement
Finance Penetration as % of New Car
Insurance Penetration as % of New Car
Extended Warranty(EW) Penetration as a % of New Car
Accessories per new car
Average Booking to Full payment disbursement turnaround time(TAT)
Qualified Lead(QL) to Retail Conversion Ratio
Test Drive(TD) Ratio
Lead Response Score (LRS)
Post Sales Feedback(PSF) Score
Customer Satisfaction Score (CSS)
No. of Customer Complaints escalation

Managing customer interface assigned to him during Workshop service for all activities and enhance customer satisfaction.
A) Customer Satisfaction & Quality of Repairs
Set, monitor and take corrective measures for the following targets:
Customer satisfaction, telephone report (Post Service follow ups), quality of work results and analysis, analyzing Customer Satisfaction Survey results and implementing short term and long term countermeasures.
Implement measures and programs to achieve customer retention and goodwill.
Ensure that parts requirements of customers are met quickly and efficiently.
Implement measures and programs in the field of customer support and loyalty.
Maintaining business relations with key workshop, parts and accessories customers (e.g. Key accounts, fleet operators, contract workshops);
Maintaining contacts with opinion – formers (such as club committees, government agencies, local politicians);
Promoting creative customer support ideas put forth by staff.
Protecting the customer’s interests in terms of the workshop service quality process chain.
Protecting the customer’s interests in terms of ensuring rapid, need-oriented supply of Audi Genuine Parts and accessories.
Meeting the quality standards as the basis for ensuring customer satisfaction
Ensure new parts and services required are identified during repair process
Drive sale of Extended Warranty and Accessories during service
B) Repair Process
Implementing Service Core process in workshop repair activities to ensure complete customer delight.
Continuous monitoring of the attainment of the goals set as above and the prompt initiation of corrective measures where required.
Work allocation amongst the workshop team, monitoring, technician rotation, allocation of technicians as per vehicle type
Coordinate with the Parts team for efficient planning for parts and consumable requirements
Regularly track and monitor ELSA Pro usage for the workshop
Implementing Final Inspection/ Q-Management (and Q-Check) to attain superior quality in workshop repairs.
Manager implementation of on road repair assistance or pick-up for vehicles off road
Ensure that the dealership is presented as the best service provider in its territory. In terms of customer relations this means that the focus of all the Workshop Manager’s efforts must be satisfaction in terms of service quality.
Facilitate and Implement IT systems in order to provide target group-oriented customer support to Service customers
Co-ordinate all activities within the workshop service department and also ensure a good level of cooperation with other departments.
Ensure that After Sales Standards and appropriate safety measures are implemented and are being followed in the workshop.
C) Profitability Management
Ensure accurate planning, implementing and reviewing of Workshop service revenues and profits in line with company targets
Monitor and analyze all KPI (Appendix) set and agreed by company and the manufacturer for workshop repair and parts department.
Monitoring and analysis of unit costs, labour costs and direct operating costs, for the Workshop and driving efficiencies on the floor
D) Personnel and Training Manager
Ensure that the organization structure for the workshop is created, approved and job descriptions defined to meet the requirements of Audi India.
Ensure that there is an overall plan in place for all workshop staff to receive regular training in order to advance the carrier within the company.
Manage effective communication of targets and update on achievement progress on a timely basis to the workshop staff
Ensure that all training records are kept up to date in HSO folders.
Ensure that ATO is updated for service staff without discrepancy.
Ensure that regular meetings are conducted with workshop service staff to discuss and improve quality standards and working processes to improve customer satisfaction
E) Infrastructure Management
Ensure that the workshop facilities are well-maintained, up-to-date, clean and tidy as per Audi standards
Ensure that all technical equipment, tools, equipment and other aids of the workshop service department are maintained as per defined maintenance guidelines
Ensure that capacity expansion planning for next five years is in place and reviewed as per dynamics of market.
Ensure that Standard infrastructure Audit requirements are fulfilled as per Audi India requirement.
F) Measures (Reports)
Total Workshop Turnover – Labor, Parts
Total Throughput – Periodic Maintenance
Customer  complaints   escalations<=10%
Maintaining Audi Standards
Dealer internal audit against standards and guidelines  >=97%
NSC Workshop (LIS) Test (Mystery shop with service department)  >=90%
Customer satisfaction Survey  >=8.8%
QC Test Program results  >=90%
Technician Productivity results from monthly department statistics  >=70%
Repeat Repair %
Job Card audit   >=90%
Special tools & workshop tools and equipment audit  >=98%
Team Attrition
G) Additional Duties and Responsibilities
As and when assigned by the management.

Primary Responsibilities: Managing customer interface assigned to him during service for all activities and enhance customer satisfaction.
A) Scheduling and arranging appointment
Ensure all required customer details are recorded in the existing customer database
Check and analyze the SSO sheet to clearly understand customer concerns, the jobs required, cost & time estimate, date of appointment for repair of the vehicle
Confirm the job and the appointment with the customer and apprise him of the necessary documents to bring
B) Prepare for Appointment
Look up customer history for jobs done last time and jobs identified but not done
Check if any relevant customer campaigns are available and applicable for the customer
Ensure availability of parts, bays and relevant technicians based on the jobs identified.
Confirm or reschedule the appointment in case of service capacity or parts non availability issue and reschedule appointment
Create order in the DMS /Manually
C) Reception and Job Order creation
In case of Walk- in customer, allocate a bay and confirm based on the job.
Retrieve customer order and complete customer details
Listen to customer concerns and align the identified job in the order
Identify new jobs based on history and a thorough diagnosis of the vehicle ( in direct reception area or by going on a test drive with a customer)
Advise the customers for the scope of job, time and estimated cost of repair
Check if any relevant customer campaigns are available and applicable for the customer
Pitch additional products and offers for the customers
Agree the method of payment and any cost limit in event of additional work needed.
Obtain confirmation of the job order by the customer's signature on the order. Provide copy of Job order hand to customer.
Make available the courtesy vehicle, or organize other means of keeping the customer mobile.
Create the service orders for PDI jobs and internal jobs in-line with the Audi Service Core Process.
D) Repairs and execution of other work
Ensure the proper correspondence and co-ordination with the insurance / leasing firm in case of repairs on accident / leased vehicles.
Hand over the Repair order to the responsible persons in the workshop.
Keep track on completion time to meet on time delivery promise
Obtain authority for additional work from the customer and document additional estimates as and when necessary
While obtaining authority Make Note of Date, Time and person’s name on the job card.(With who/when/what)
E) Quality control and preparation for vehicle return
Ensure the work requested is completed by the workshop. Final test drive and quality checks are carried out and any problems fully recorded.
Check the Job order has been completed in full.  Verify all entries in the job card (workshop copy)
Notify the customer of any delays
Complete the invoice, taking account of warranty and goodwill provisions.
F) Vehicle return and billing
Verify the customer's identity and entitlement to collect the vehicle, based on the duplicate copy of the order.
Generate Performa Invoice, discuss with customer and take confirmation from customer and then generate Final Invoice
Explain the work done, invoice charges including warranty repairs and any other work carried out free of charge.
Hand out the invoice (created on DMS).
Ensure customer vehicle is ready at the reception area cleaned (well valeted) and all the protective seat covers and mats are removed.
Actively advise the customer of next due date for servicing.
After payment of the invoice, return the vehicle to the customer personally.
Advise the customer of job which will require attention in near future
Take leave of the customer personally.
G) Planning
Existing and new customer acquisition planning to improve market share and improve overall customer satisfaction
Other Responsibility
PDI for New Vehicles
Coordinate and identify vehicles for delivery for PDI
Open PDI job card and Ensure capacity and technician availability for PDI
Execute PDI Checklist and check for completion of the job
Confirm completion of PDI to the Delivery /Sales team
Be available for Service advisor introduction during New Vehicle delivery
Used Car
Execute Audi Used car checklist and execute the process
Identify the repairs and estimate for the job, communicate to the Used Car team and Service Manager
Receive confirmation and execute the repair
Conduct and certify the car for Audi Approved plus for Used Car business
Customer Satisfaction and Complaint Management
Own customer complaints and drive resolution with the SLA defined by Audi India
Coordinate with the relevant workshop teams to understand and Resolve PSF complaints received from customers within defined time limits
Ensure customer experience is high based on the Service experience of the customer
H) Measures (Reports)
Workshop labor and parts Sales
Maintaining Audi Standards
Customer Service Satisfaction results
Post Service Feedback survey results
Customer complaints
Repeat Repair %
NSC Workshop (LIS) Test (Mystery shop with service department)  >=90%
QC Test Program results  >=90%
Job Card audit   >=100%
Additional Responsibilities
Ensure compliance with all directives, rules and regulations imposed by the law, government agencies, the manufacturer and the dealership relating to customer advice.
Any other assignment as and when assigned by the management.
To ensure and take actions when the R8 vehicle comes for service

Primary Responsibilities: Managing customer interface assigned to him\her during bodyshop repair for all activities and enhance customer satisfaction.
A) Scheduling and arranging appointment
Introduce self and the dealership organization to the customer and share greetings with the customer
Ensure all required customer details are recorded in the existing customer database
Clearly define the customer concerns and identify the jobs required for repair of the vehicle
Check on the customer for any mobility requirements and organize the same in coordination with the CRE
B) Prepare for Appointment
In case of appointment, ensure availability of the assigned bay based on the day of appointment.
In case of walk- in customer, allocate bay basis availability and confirm based on the job.
Prioritize job schedule basis Audi India guidelines such as for Bespoke vehicles and repair
Look up customer history for jobs done last time and jobs identified but not done
Ensure availability of relevant technicians, tools, and parts required for the completion of the job
Create order in the DMS /Manually
C) Reception and Job Order creation
On the day of service appointment, retrieve customer order and complete customer details
Listen to customer concerns and align the identified job in the order appropriately
Identify all additional jobs required, based on a thorough diagnosis of the vehicle
Advise the customer on the scope of job, time and estimated cost of repair
Pitch additional products such as accessories and other VAS and offers to the customers
Understand and agree with the customer on the method of payment and any cost limit in event of additional work needed.
Obtain confirmation of the job order by the customer's signature on the order. Provide copy of Job order to the customer.
Make available the courtesy vehicle, or organize other means to address the customer’s mobility requirements.
In case of on-road breakdowns, ensure availability of the emergency vehicle for inspecting the vehicle on site and brining the vehicle to the service center.
Create the service orders for PDI jobs and internal jobs in-line with the Audi Service Core Process.
Insurance claim form fill-up and registration with the insurance company through a toll-free number
D) Repairs and execution of other work
Ensure proper correspondence and co-ordination with the insurance / leasing firm in case of repairs on accident / leased vehicles.
Clearly explain and hand over the repair order to the responsible persons in the workshop.
Keep track of the repair progress to ensure adherence to the promised delivery timelines.
Obtain authority for additional work from the customer and document additional estimates as and when required
While obtaining authority make note of date, time, and person’s name on the job card.(With who/when/what)
E) Quality control and preparation for vehicle return
Ensure the work requested is completed by the bodyshop, final test drive and quality checks are carried out and any problems fully recorded.
Carry out final check using the lifting platform and check if the job order has been completed in full.  Verify all entries in the job card (workshop copy)
Coordinate with the Customer Care team to notify the customer in case of any unexpected delays in repair and vehicle delivery
Complete the invoice, taking account of warranty and goodwill provisions.
F) Vehicle return and billing
Verify the customer's identity and entitlement to collect the vehicle based on the duplicate copy of the order.
Explain the work done to the customer, invoice charges including warranty repairs, and any other repair work carried on the vehicle.
Clearly explain all elements and hand out the invoice (created on DMS) to the customer.
Ensure customer vehicle is ready at the reception area cleaned (well valeted) and with all the protective seat covers and mats removed.
After payment of the invoice, personally handover the vehicle to the customer.
Advise the customer about any immediate campaigns or self-service checks being organized in the near future
Advise the customer of the jobs which will require his/her attention in near future
G) Customer Satisfaction and Complaint Management
Take ownership of all customer complaints and drive resolution in coordination with responsible teams in alignment with the SLAs defined by the dealership and Audi India
Ensure a best in class customer experience based on the bodyshop service experience of the customer
Build relationship with key vendors and local players
H) Measure Reports
Bodyshop labor and parts Sales
Maintaining Audi Standards
Customer Service Satisfaction results
Post Service Feedback survey results
Customer complaints
Repeat Repair %
Job card/Invoice internal audit results  >=90%
Additional Responsibilities
Ensure compliance with all directives, rules and regulations imposed by the law, government agencies, the manufacturer and the dealership relating to customer advice.
Any other assignment as and when assigned by the management

Posting_Title: General Manager – Sales or Head of Sales
Job_Opening_Name: General Manager – Sales or Head of Sales
Job_Description:
The Audi GM Sales directs the sales team competently and manages the processes of the entire sales department at the Audi dealership. By motivating those in the department and ensuring their continuous development, he ensures that the volume and profit targets agreed on with the management of the dealership are achieved. In line with the strategy of AUDI India, he takes action to exploit the market potential. He ensures that every customer receives an excellent sales experience and is instrumental in the fact that customers are enthusiastic about the Audi brand and the dealership.
Primary Responsibilities
Volume plan achievement
Responsible for target achievement for the dealer through strong team management
Training of the sales team for driving Sales process
Own the customer satisfaction process for Sales for his team
Responsible for Sales Department profitability
Align Marketing plan in line with the business requirement
Strategy and Planning
Use the understanding of the luxury car market potential to define the dealership sales strategy and annual, quarterly and monthly sales targets in alignment with the sales appendix
Apply analytical skills and business acumen to define the target achievement strategy by conducting business planning and forecasting exercises for the Retail, Bespoke, Corporate, Upcountry and VAS sales teams
Demonstrate a strong hold on market and customer insights to drive the design of impactful customer offers and solution themes for the market in alignment with Audi India and dealership management
Support the definition of the dealership marketing strategy and marketing plan to strengthen the Audi brand and support sales target achievement
Optimize the four sales channels of Retail, Upcountry, Bespoke, and corporate to ensure maximum potential utilization of the market.
Sales Process Oversight
Regularly track sales progress by conducting sales KPI achievement and process execution reviews with individual department heads and define mid-course corrections as required
Track and review customer satisfaction KPIs and ensure overall customer experience as per Audi standards
Provide guidance and support to the Sales team as and when required through the sales cycle to ensure high lead conversion ratio
Act as a key contributor to the Sales process by cultivating personal contacts to potential major customers (such as authorities, trade associations, clubs, suppliers, companies)
Act as key interface with the service organization and coordinate with service workshop and spares department for smooth business operations and higher customer satisfaction
Organization
Support the definition of the vision / mission statement for the dealership organization
Create and maintain the Sales team organization structure such that it is aligned to achieve the overall business objectives defined by the dealership management and Audi India
Coordinate with the HR department, dealership management and Audi India to ensure deployment of critical HR processes at the dealership to ensure an effective and engaged workforce
Take ownership of the overall flow of communication related to targets, policies, performance, customer offers and other directives from dealership management and Audi India across the dealership sales organization
As the owner of the overall sales process at the dealership, proactively drive process excellence and innovation in alignment with the dealership and Audi India strategic goals
Ensure  cascading of targets through MBO definition and driving ownership and accountability down to each role holder by driving an efficient performance management system
Secondary Responsibilities
Take ownership of the overall customer experience and ensures showroom infrastructure and preparedness levels of customer facing staff is as per the Audi standards
Measures (Reports):
New Cars Overall Target Achievement
New Car Model-wise Target Achievement
Basic margin retention
Monthly Bonus – as per Appendix
Quarterly and Annual Bonus  – as per Appendix
Marketing Event Payout – as per Appendix
Other income per car (Finance, Insurance, VAS income)
Direct Profit Per car Sold
Gross Profit(GP) Per Used car Sold
Monthly Market Share
Average Booking to Full payment disbursement turnaround time(TAT)
Stock Ageing
Days of Stock on 1st Opening every month
Decommissioned Demo car Stock – as per norms
Retail Sales Standards(RSS) = 100%
Lead Response Score(LRS) = 100%
Sales Department Attrition
AI training attended by Sales staff

Posting_Title: General Manager – Aftersales or Head of Aftersales

In line with the strategy of AUDI India, he takes action to exploit the aftersales market potential. Service Revenue plan achievement
Responsible for service revenue target achievement for the dealership through strong team management and process adherence
Training of the aftersales team for driving Service core processes
Own the customer specific process for Aftersales for his team
Responsible for Aftersales Department profitability
Align Service Marketing plan in line with the business requirement

Uses his expert understanding of the luxury car aftersales market potential to define the dealership aftersales strategy and Annual, Quarterly and monthly targets in alignment with the dealership management and Audi India
Defines the dealership service marketing strategy and an optimal marketing plan to strengthen the dealership and Audi brand in the market and drive aftersales target achievement
Applies his analytical skills and business acumen to define the target achievement strategy by conducting business planning and forecasting exercises for the Front Office, Workshop, Bodyshop, Parts and Service Marketing teams
Demonstrates strong hold on the aftersales business and customer insights to drive the design of impactful customer offers and solution themes for the market in alignment with Audi India and dealership management
Ensures  cascading of targets through MBO definition and driving ownership and accountability down to each role holder by driving an efficient performance management system
Regularly tracks progress by conducting aftersales KPI achievement and process execution reviews with individual department heads and uses his problem solving skills to define mid-course corrections as required
As a critical owner for creating a unique Audi brand experience for customers, regularly tracks and reviews customer satisfaction KPIs and ensures overall customer experience as per Audi standards
Organization
Leads by example and define the vision\mission statement for the dealership aftersales organization in alignment with the dealership management and Audi India
As owner of the overall service processes at the dealership, proactively drives process excellence and innovation in alignment with the dealership and Audi India strategic goals
Create and maintain the Service team organization structure such that it is aligned to achieve the overall business objectives defined by the dealership management and Audi India
Coordinate with the HR department, dealership management and Audi India to ensure deployment of critical HR processes to ensure an effective and engaged service workforce
Takes ownership of the overall flow of communication related to targets, policies, performance, customer offers and other directives from dealership management and Audi India across the dealership aftersales organization
Secondary Responsibilities
Acts as a key contributor to the Service experience, uses his superior interpersonal skills by cultivating personal relationship with key customers (such as authorities, trade associations, clubs, suppliers, companies, key customers) and promotes the company image
Uses his experience and conflict resolution skills to resolve all critical customer issues and complaints to ensure high level of customer satisfaction
Takes ownership of the overall customer experience and ensures service infrastructure and preparedness levels of customer facing staff is as per the Audi standards
Act as key interface with the sales organization and coordinate with the Sales and support departments for smooth business operations and higher customer satisfaction

Total Turnover – Labor , Parts across Workshop and Bodyshop
Total GP as % of Aftersales Turnover
Total Throughput Aftersales
Days of Stock(Parts and Accessories)

Customer  complaints   <=10%

The IT Coordinator acts as a key contributor to help the dealer achieve and maintain the highest level of technical operations and systems reliability in conformance to corporate norms.
